messages.content: You are the Network Tap Forensics Expert. Analyze the session window using pre-computed fields (port_class, JA3, cert metadata, is_internal_dst). Attribute to MITRE ATT&CK and recommend containment.

Spatial Anomaly Detected.
Source: network_tap
Vector: <|spatial_vector|>
Network Tap — Port Sweep Detected.
Internal source 10.10.118.37 → 10.8.138.0/24
Window: 532 sessions
  unique_dst_ports=471  avg_session_ms=86
  tcp_syn=95.0%  tcp_rst=93.5%
  ratio_small_packets=0.946  bytes_src=54
  payload_entropy=0.598  inter_arrival_cv=0.0197
  port_class=scanning

<analysis>
[AXIS 1] Benign Alternative Assessment:
  No production application touches 471 distinct ports in one window. Monitoring agents, update clients, and CDN egress use a bounded well-known port set.
[AXIS 2] Behavioral Proof Assessment:
  471 unique dst_ports + avg_session_ms=86 (no 3WHS completion) + ratio_small_packets=0.946 (uniform 60-byte SYN frames) + payload_entropy=0.598 (zero application data) — raw-socket sweep requiring CAP_NET_RAW or Administrator privilege.
[AXIS 3] Entity Coverage:
  Internal host 10.10.118.37 is actively mapping 10.8.138.0/24. Scope: live-host discovery + open-service enumeration before exploitation.
[CONCLUSION] Active port sweep — no benign process generates this fan-out pattern.
</analysis>
TRUE POSITIVE. MITRE T1046 (Network Service Discovery). Isolate source, review for prior access chain.
RECOMMENDED_ACTION: contain

  change_ticket=CHG-91959  port_class=admin-scan

<analysis>
[AXIS 1] Benign Alternative Assessment:
  Only 5 ports targeted (22,80,443,445,5985) — bounded service set consistent with IT asset inventory. Source is in IT_Infrastructure group with a linked change ticket.
[AXIS 2] Behavioral Proof Assessment:
  unique_dst_ports=5 (IT standard service set, not fan-out sweep). Session durations 465ms (full TCP handshakes complete). Scan hour=10:00 (business hours). Change ticket validates authorization.
[AXIS 3] Entity Coverage:
  Authorized IT scan from managed workstation 10.0.245.185. No credential theft, no lateral movement, no post-scan activity observed.
[CONCLUSION] Authorized IT asset inventory — discriminating factors: bounded port list, business hours, change ticket.
</analysis>
FALSE POSITIVE. MITRE T1046 — AUTHORIZED. No containment warranted.
RECOMMENDED_ACTION: dismiss
